rationale: The answer immediately refuses to open another transfer channel, frames the pattern as repeated downstream split creation for each new dispute type, and moves upstream to cross-entry triage, responsibility attribution, unified rules, material completeness, authority boundaries, and compensation-judgment mechanisms.
